final:
module dram_cell (
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] obf_storage;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            obf_storage <= data_in; // Write data to obf_storage
        end
        else begin
            data_out <= obf_storage; // Read data from obf_storage
        end
    end
endmodule
